NCT03043872.label: Outcome
NCT03043872.text: 268 patients were allocated to the durvalumab plus platinum-etoposide group and 269 to the platinum-etoposide group.

NCT05012007.label: Outcome
NCT05012007.text: PARTICIPANTS: A total of 2658 veterans enrolled at VA Puget Sound Health Care System who were aged 45-75 and had an average risk of colorectal cancer.
